title: The Killing of Abu Rafi' the Jew
description: Abu Ja'far (al-Tabari) says: In this year, it is said, the killing of Abu Rafi' the Jew took place. The reason for his being killed was, it is said, that he used to take the part of Ka'b b. al-Ashraf against the Messenger of God. The Messenger of God is said to have sent 161. IH, 714-6, 981; W, 391-5; Watt, Medina, 21:f.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
